backend.changelog: Docs + i18n catch-up after the ADR-019 source-cache-freshness stack landed earlier today (1.1.12 + CadBridge 1.8.45 + 1.1.13). No code behavior change. The Force Regenerate toggle tooltip now correctly describes both clauses: OFF auto-detects cestamp changes on 3DEXPERIENCE and refreshes only the items that actually changed; ON forces close+reopen of every BOM source (parts + assemblies + drawings) so SOLIDWORKS Connector pulls the latest rep before SaveAs3 writes the derivative. Wiki + glossary + tech spec updated in the same commit. Client-side end-to-end test passed today on the actual customer BOM.

cadBridge.changelog: ADR-019 Stage B -- agent honors StaleItems[] (EngItem PLMIDs) and StaleDrawingPids[] sent by frontend (1.1.13+). At Generate start, before the BOM-driven OpenDoc7-per-item loop, the agent enumerates open SW docs and closes any whose GetPLMID() matches the stale set. The subsequent EngItem-OpenDoc7 path (1.8.43+) then pulls the latest rep from the platform instead of returning the stale in-memory handle. New Stale bool on PreCacheDrawingItem skips the cached-.SLDDRW SwDm short-circuit and forces OpenDoc7. Backward compatible: older frontends sending empty / null lists trigger no close-pass.
